examples: Earlier this year Kodak announced that it was discontinuing its Kodachrome slide film because of lack of demand.
With the final roll of Kodachrome film developed in Kansas on Thursday, the widely-lauded quality color film has become a history.
With the final roll of Kodachrome film developed in Kansas on Thursday, the widely-lauded quality color film has become a history。
Since switching to digital photography along with everyone else several years ago, I'm missing Kodachrome's nice bright colors and greens of summer.
Even Kodak stopped making Kodachrome this year, after 70 years.
